message:
🐛 Fix alerts stat block showing 'Not available' on Cluster Admin dashboard (#1570)

The alerts_firing stat block was hardcoded to return { value: '-' } in the
dashboard-specific getter, and the universal getter only handled 'firing'
(not 'alerts_firing'). This caused the merged getter to fall through to
the 'Not available on this dashboard' fallback.

Fix:
- Remove hardcoded alerts_firing case from ClusterAdmin.tsx
- Add 'alerts_firing' alias to 'firing' case in useUniversalStats.ts

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
